hooks.command: ls process/collaboration/locks/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v locks.md | head -5 | while read f; do echo "ACTIVE LOCK: $(cat process/collaboration/locks/$f)" >&2; done; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: Check process/collaboration/locks/ for active locks. Files covered by a lock may change while you read them."}}'

ls process/collaboration/locks/ 2>/dev/null | grep -v locks.md | head -5 | while read f; do echo "ACTIVE LOCK: $(cat process/collaboration/locks/$f)" >&2; done; echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"Reminder: Before writing, check process/collaboration/locks/ for conflicts. You must add a lock file before writing and remove it when done. See process/collaboration/collaboration.md for the format."}}'
